4. Let's create a theme context for managing dark/light mode:

---

```diff
- 
+ import { createContext, useContext, useEffect, useState } from 'react';
+ 
+ const ThemeContext = createContext();
+ 
+ export const ThemeProvider = ({ children }) => {
+   const [darkMode, setDarkMode] = useState(false);
+ 
+   // Check for saved theme preference or use OS preference
+   useEffect(() => {
+     const isDarkMode = localStorage.getItem('darkMode') === 'true' || 
+       (window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches);
+     
+     setDarkMode(isDarkMode);
+   }, []);
+ 
+   // Apply theme class to document
+   useEffect(() => {
+     if (darkMode) {
+       document.documentElement.classList.add('dark');
+     } else {
+       document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');
+     }
+     localStorage.setItem('darkMode', darkMode.toString());
+   }, [darkMode]);
+ 
+   const toggleDarkMode = () => {
+     setDarkMode(!darkMode);
+   };
+ 
+   return (
+     <ThemeContext.Provider value={{ darkMode, toggleDarkMode }}>
+       {children}
+     </ThemeContext.Provider>
+   );
+ };
+ 
+ export const useTheme = () => useContext(ThemeContext);
+ 
+ export default ThemeContext; 
```

5. Let's create a toggle button component for the theme:

---

```diff
- 
+ import React from 'react';
+ import { FontAwesomeIcon } from '@fortawesome/react-fontawesome';
+ import { faSun, faMoon } from '@fortawesome/free-solid-svg-icons';
+ import { useTheme } from '../../context/ThemeContext';
+ 
+ const ThemeToggle = () => {
+   const { darkMode, toggleDarkMode } = useTheme();
+ 
+   return (
+     <button
+       onClick={toggleDarkMode}
+       className="p-2 rounded-full transition-colors duration-200 hover:bg-gray-200 dark:hover:bg-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-primary-DEFAULT"
+       aria-label={darkMode ? 'Switch to light mode' : 'Switch to dark mode'}
+     >
+       <FontAwesomeIcon
+         icon={darkMode ? faSun : faMoon}
+         className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-200"
+       />
+     </button>
+   );
+ };
+ 
+ export default ThemeToggle; 
```

```diff
+ import React, { useState } from 'react';
+ import { FontAwesomeIcon } from '@fortawesome/react-fontawesome';
+ import { faBars, faTimes } from '@fortawesome/free-solid-svg-icons';
+ import ThemeToggle from '../ui/ThemeToggle';
+ 
+ const Navbar = () => {
+   const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);
+ 
+   const toggleMobileMenu = () => {
+     setMobileMenuOpen(!mobileMenuOpen);
+   };
+ 
+   return (
+     <nav className="bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 shadow-sm">
+       <div className="container py-4">
+         <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
+           {/* Logo */}
+           <div className="flex-shrink-0">
+             <span className="text-2xl font-bold text-primary-DEFAULT dark:text-white">
+               Agilit-e
+             </span>
+           </div>
+ 
+           {/* Desktop Menu */}
+           <div className="hidden md:flex items-center space-x-8">
+             <a href="#features" className="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300 hover:text-primary-DEFAULT dark:hover:text-white transition-colors">
+               Features
+             </a>
+             <a href="#services" className="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300 hover:text-primary-DEFAULT dark:hover:text-white transition-colors">
+               Services
+             </a>
+             <a href="#about" className="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300 hover:text-primary-DEFAULT dark:hover:text-white transition-colors">
+               About
+             </a>
+             <a href="#contact" className="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300 hover:text-primary-DEFAULT dark:hover:text-white transition-colors">
+               Contact
+             </a>
+             <ThemeToggle />
+           </div>
+ 
+           {/* Mobile menu button */}
+           <div className="md:hidden flex items-center">
+             <ThemeToggle />
+             <button 
+               onClick={toggleMobileMenu}
+               className="ml-2 p-2 rounded-md text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700 focus:outline-none"
+               aria-expanded={mobileMenuOpen}
+               aria-label="Toggle mobile menu"
+             >
+               <FontAwesomeIcon icon={mobileMenuOpen ? faTimes : faBars} className="h-6 w-6" />
+             </button>
+           </div>
+         </div>
+       </div>
+ 
+       {/* Mobile Menu */}
+       {mobileMenuOpen && (
+         <div className="md:hidden bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 px-2 pb-4">
+           <div className="container flex flex-col space-y-4 pt-2 pb-3">
+             <a href="#features" className="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300 hover:text-primary-DEFAULT dark:hover:text-white transition-colors px-3 py-2 rounded-md">
+               Features

+             <a href="#services" className="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300 hover:text-primary-DEFAULT dark:hover:text-white transition-colors px-3 py-2 rounded-md">
+               Services
+             </a>
+             <a href="#about" className="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300 hover:text-primary-DEFAULT dark:hover:text-white transition-colors px-3 py-2 rounded-md">
+               About
+             </a>
+             <a href="#contact" className="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300 hover:text-primary-DEFAULT dark:hover:text-white transition-colors px-3 py-2 rounded-md">
+               Contact
+             </a>
+           </div>
+         </div>
+       )}
+     </nav>
+   );
+ };
+ 
+ export default Navbar;
```

```diff
+ };
+ 
+ const Features = () => {

+

+           <p className="text-xl text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300 max-w-3xl mx-auto">
+             We deliver innovative solutions that help businesses thrive in the digital landscape.
+           </p>
+         </div>
+         
+         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-8">
+           {features.map((feature, index) => (
+             <FeatureCard 
+               key={index}
+               icon={feature.icon}
+               title={feature.title}
+               description={feature.description}
+             />
+           ))}
+         </div>
+       </div>
+     </section>
+   );
+ };
+ 
+ export default Features; 
```

The development server is now starting in the background. Once it's ready, you can view the Agilit-e landing page at http://localhost:3000 in your web browser.

The landing page includes:
- A responsive navbar with dark/light mode toggle
- Hero section with call-to-action buttons
- Features section showcasing key services
- Contact form with location and business information
- Footer with company information and links

All components support both light and dark modes, which can be toggled using the sun/moon icon in the navbar. The theme preference will be saved to local storage and will persist between visits.

   - **Footer**: Updated with brand colors and Agilit-e specific content

3. **Color Scheme**:
   - Primary: Agilit-e Red (#E31E24)
   - Secondary: Agilit-e Black (#000000)
   - Background: White (#FFFFFF)
   - Text: Agilit-e Grey (#666666)
   - Light Grey: #F5F5F5
   - Dark Grey: #333333

4. **Dark Mode**:
   - Background: Agilit-e Black
   - Text: White and Light Grey
   - Accents: Agilit-e Red

```diff
+           <line x1="75" y1="70" x2="55" y2="55" stroke="#E30613" strokeWidth="1" />
+           <line x1="50" y1="85" x2="50" y2="60" stroke="#E30613" strokeWidth="1" />
+           <line x1="25" y1="70" x2="45" y2="55" stroke="#E30613" strokeWidth="1" />
+           <line x1="25" y1="30" x2="45" y2="45" stroke="#E30613" strokeWidth="1" />
+         </svg>
+       </div>
+       
+       {/* Agilit-e text */}
+       {showText && (
+         <span className={`text-xl font-bold ${textColor} dark:text-white tracking-wide`}>
+           AGILIT-E
+         </span>
+       )}
+     </div>
+   );
+ };
+ 
+ export default Logo; 
```

I've implemented the official Agilit-e logo and fixed the dark mode visibility issues:

1. **Logo Implementation**:

   - Replicated the exact colors from the banner (bright red #E30613 for the network nodes and slate gray #4A545E for the text)

2. **Dark Mode Improvements**:
   - Updated text colors to ensure proper contrast and visibility in dark mode
   - Changed background colors to create better contrast
   - Improved the hover and focus states for better accessibility
   - Made all text clearly visible on any background

3. **Color Updates**:
   - Updated the color scheme to match the Agilit-e brand:
     - Primary color: #E30613 (bright red)
     - Text color: #4A545E (slate gray)
     - Dark mode background: Black with lighter slate gray sections
     - Consistent use of red for highlights and call-to-action elements

4. **Other Enhancements**:
   - Updated page title and metadata to reflect Agilit-e branding
   - Set theme color to match brand red
   - Improved overall accessibility with better contrast ratios

The website should now accurately represent the Agilit-e brand with the proper logo, colors, and improved visibility in both light and dark modes.

1. **New Background Design**:

   - Created two soft radial gradients with very light red (Agilit-e brand color) at different positions:

   - Reduced the BackgroundEffect opacity to 30% for better balance

   - Removed the red glow/after-effects from the headings
   - Kept the clean, bold look with the red accent color
   - Simplified the text styling for better readability

3. **Simplified Company Cards**:
   - Removed complex gradient overlays
   - Added subtle hover states with light gray backgrounds
   - Kept the icon scaling animation on hover
   - Maintained brand color accents in a more subtle way

4. **Container Styling**:
   - Increased the opacity of the white background for better contrast
   - Removed border and gradient effects for a cleaner look
   - Maintained the backdrop blur for depth

The result is a more sophisticated and balanced design that:
- Has more visual interest in the background without being distracting
- Maintains brand identity through subtle use of the red color
- Improves readability and clarity
- Works well in both light and dark modes

- Works harmoniously in both light and dark modes

I've completely redesigned the background with a more impactful, non-animated approach using stronger colors:

1. **New Background Structure**:
   - Replaced all animations with a clean, modern static design
   - Used a simpler gradient background with stronger base colors
   - Added diagonal color bands in Agilit-e red that create dynamic visual interest
   - Implemented a geometric grid pattern using SVG for a technical, integration-focused look
   - Placed strategic color accents with soft blur effects

2. **Enhanced Color Intensity**:
   - Increased the opacity of the Agilit-e red elements (20%-30% vs previous 5%-15%)
   - Used stronger color contrast throughout
   - Added more saturated background elements
   - Improved dark mode with deeper, richer colors

3. **Improved Card Design**:
   - Added a distinctive red bottom border to the client showcase card
   - Increased background opacity for better contrast (95% vs previous 80%) 
   - Enhanced icon containers with stronger brand-colored backgrounds
   - Added subtle shadows for depth and dimension

4. **Professional Touches**:
   - Created diagonal bands that suggest motion and direction without animation
   - Implemented a subtle geometric pattern using the brand's red color
   - Enhanced text contrast for better readability
   - Added strategic color accents that reinforce the brand identity

The result is a more sophisticated, professional design with:
- Better visual hierarchy and focus on content
- Stronger brand presence through strategic use of color
- A technical, integration-focused aesthetic through the geometric pattern
- Enhanced contrast and readability in both light and dark modes
- A modern, clean look that maintains a sense of dynamism without relying on animation

The design now feels more intentional and polished, with a stronger visual identity that better represents Agilit-e's brand.

   - Added blue and indigo gradient bands in the top section
   - Added an indigo accent blob in the top right
   - Used indigo borders for the client showcase section

2. **Made Text Colors Bolder**:
   - Changed text from light slate to stronger gray-800 for headings
   - Used a richer gray-700 for body text
   - Increased contrast throughout for better readability

3. **Created Color Contrast with Buttons**:
   - Changed the "Our Services" button to a bold indigo-600 color
   - This creates a nice visual balance with the red "Contact Us" button
   - Both buttons now have equal visual weight

4. **Enhanced Company Icons**:
   - Updated the icon containers with indigo gradients
   - Changed icon colors to indigo in light mode
   - Made the hover effects still use the Agilit-e red for brand consistency

5. **Maintained Dark Mode**:
   - Kept the existing dark mode theme with red accents
   - Ensured smooth transitions between light and dark modes

The result is a more balanced and professional color scheme that:
- Uses a complementary color palette of blue/indigo with red accents
- Provides better visual hierarchy and contrast
- Feels bolder and more modern in light mode
- Maintains the brand identity through strategic use of red
- Creates a sense of depth and dimension through layered color

This approach reduces the dominance of red while still keeping it as an important accent color that emphasizes key elements like the "Integrations" text and the "Contact Us" button.

```diff
+     // Check for user preference in localStorage
+     const savedTheme = localStorage.getItem('theme');
+     if (savedTheme) {
+       setTheme(savedTheme);
+       document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark', savedTheme === 'dark');
+     } else if (window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches) {
+       // Use system preference as fallback
+       setTheme('dark');
+       document.documentElement.classList.add('dark');
+     }
+   }, []);
+ 
+   const toggleTheme = () => {
+     const newTheme = theme === 'light' ? 'dark' : 'light';
+     setTheme(newTheme);
+     document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark');
+     localStorage.setItem('theme', newTheme);
+   };
+
```

```diff
+               className={`text-3xl text-agilite-red/20 dark:text-agilite-red/30 animate-float-${i % 3 + 1}`}
+             />
+           </div>
+         ))}
+       </div>
+       
+       {/* Animated gradients */}
+       <div className="absolute inset-0">
+         <div className="absolute top-1/3 right-1/4 w-96 h-96 bg-agilite-red/5 dark:bg-agilite-red/10 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-pulse-slow"></div>
+         <div className="absolute bottom-1/3 left-1/4 w-96 h-96 bg-agilite-red/5 dark:bg-agilite-red/10 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-pulse-slower"></div>
+       </div>
        
        <div className="container relative z-10">
              <ServiceCard 
                key={index}
+               index={index}
                icon={service.icon}
                title={service.title}
```

```diff
+ const TeamMember = ({ name, role, image, socials }) => {

+         <div className="aspect-w-1 aspect-h-1 w-full">

+             src={image} 
+             alt={name}
+             className="w-full h-full object-cover group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500"
+           />
+         </div>
+         <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-agilite-red/80 to-transparent opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300 flex items-end justify-center">
+           <div className="flex space-x-4 mb-6">
+             {socials.linkedin && (
+               <a 
+                 href={socials.linkedin} 
+                 target="_blank" 
+                 rel="noopener noreferrer"
+                 className="text-white hover:text-gray-200 transition-colors"
+               >
+                 <FontAwesomeIcon icon={faLinkedin} className="h-6 w-6" />
+               </a>
+             )}
+             {socials.twitter && (
+               <a 
+                 href={socials.twitter} 
+                 target="_blank" 
+                 rel="noopener noreferrer"
+                 className="text-white hover:text-gray-200 transition-colors"
+               >
+                 <FontAwesomeIcon icon={faTwitter} className="h-6 w-6" />
+               </a>
+             )}
+             {socials.github && (
+               <a 
+                 href={socials.github} 
+                 target="_blank" 
+                 rel="noopener noreferrer"
+                 className="text-white hover:text-gray-200 transition-colors"
+               >
+                 <FontAwesomeIcon icon={faGithub} className="h-6 w-6" />
+               </a>
+             )}
+           </div>
+         </div>
+       </div>
+       <div className="p-6 text-center">
+         <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 dark:text-white mb-1 group-hover:text-agilite-red transition-colors duration-300">{name}</h3>
+         <p className="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300">{role}</p>
+       </div>
+     </div>
+   );
+ };
+ 
+ const Team = () => {
+   const teamMembers = [
+     {
+       name: 'Alex Johnson',
+       role: 'CEO & Founder',
+       image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1560250097-0b93528c311a?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&ixid=MnwxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8&auto=format&fit=crop&w=687&q=80',
+       socials: {
+         linkedin: 'https://linkedin.com',
+         twitter: 'https://twitter.com',
+         github: 'https://github.com'
+       }
+     },
+     {
+       name: 'Sarah Williams',
+       role: 'CTO',
+       image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1573496359142-b8d87734a5a2?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&ixid=MnwxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8&auto=format&fit=crop&w=688&q=80',
+       socials: {
+         linkedin: 'https://linkedin.com',
+         twitter: 'https://twitter.com'
+       }
+     },
+     {
+       name: 'Michael Chen',
+       role: 'Lead Developer',
+       image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1472099645785-5658abf4ff4e?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&ixid=MnwxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8&auto=format&fit=crop&w=1170&q=80',
+       socials: {
+         linkedin: 'https://linkedin.com',
+         github: 'https://github.com'
+       }
+     },
+     {
+       name: 'Sophia Rodriguez',
+       role: 'UX Designer',
+       image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1580489944761-15a19d654956?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&ixid=MnwxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8&auto=format&fit=crop&w=761&q=80',
+       socials: {
+         linkedin: 'https://linkedin.com',
+         twitter: 'https://twitter.com',
+         github: 'https://github.com'
+       }
+     }
+   ];
+ 
+   return (
+     <section id="team" className="py-20 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-900 relative overflow-hidden">
+       <BackgroundEffect className="opacity-30" />
+       
+       <div className="container relative z-10">
+         <div className="text-center mb-16">
+           <h2 className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-gray-800 dark:text-white mb-4">
+             Meet Our Team

+             Our talented team of experts is dedicated to delivering innovative integration solutions.
+           </p>
+         </div>
+ 
+         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-8">
+           {teamMembers.map((member, index) => (
+             <TeamMember 
+               key={index}
+               name={member.name}
+               role={member.role}
+               image={member.image}
+               socials={member.socials}
+             />
+           ))}
+         </div>
+       </div>
+     </section>
+   );
+ };
+ 
+ export default Team;
```

1. **Layered Textures and Patterns:**
   - Added a subtle texture pattern with small plus signs in Agilit-e's red color (low opacity)
   - Implemented a diagonal repeating stripe pattern that adds visual interest without being distracting
   - Created a more complex layout with multiple visual elements

2. **Dynamic Color Accents:**
   - Placed larger, more strategically positioned color blobs with the brand's red color
   - Added several accent elements in different sizes and positions
   - Created a sense of depth with overlapping elements
   - Added a subtle rotation to some elements for more visual interest

3. **Visual Hierarchy:**
   - Used varying levels of opacity and blur to create depth
   - Positioned elements to draw the eye through the page
   - Maintained contrast between the background and content

4. **Special Effects:**
   - Used SVG background patterns for crisp rendering at any resolution
   - Added subtle transformations to create more organic shapes
   - Created a custom utility class in Tailwind for the diagonal stripes

The result is a much more visually interesting background that:
- Uses the brand's red color in a tasteful way
- Creates depth and visual interest without being distracting
- Provides a more dynamic and engaging user experience
- Maintains readability and usability
- Works well in both light and dark modes

These changes should make the site much more visually appealing while still maintaining its professional look.

---

I've completely redesigned the background to be more eye-catching and impactful, without any floating elements. Here's what I've created:

1. **Clean, Bold Design Elements:**
   - Created a striking diagonal accent that spans across the screen
   - Added a bold corner gradient in the bottom left
   - Included sharp geometric accents with clean lines
   - Used a subtle directional gradient background

2. **More Professional Approach:**
   - Removed all floating elements and patterns
   - Used clean, crisp geometric shapes instead
   - Created visual interest through angles and gradients
   - Added subtle brand-colored accents that draw the eye

3. **Increased Visual Impact:**
   - Utilized stronger color contrast for better visibility
   - Created diagonal elements that guide the eye through the content
   - Used the brand's red color in a more deliberate, architectural way
   - Added light-mode-only accents that enhance the design without being distracting

The result is a much cleaner, more professional background that:
- Creates visual interest without any "floating crap"
- Uses modern design principles with clean lines and angles
- Enhances the brand presence without overwhelming the content
- Maintains readability and focus on the main content
- Provides a distinctive look that sets the site apart

These changes should make the site more attractive and eye-catching while maintaining a professional, clean appearance that aligns with Agilit-e's brand identity.

I've completely revamped the background with a more vibrant gradient design:

1. The base gradient now incorporates subtle Agilit-e red accents to make it more vibrant
2. Fixed the visibility issue by changing `hidden` to `block` for the light mode elements
3. Added multiple layered gradient elements to create depth and visual interest:
   - Diagonal vibrant gradients across the entire background
   - Corner accents with Agilit-e red and slate colors
   - Larger, more visible glass panels with vibrant color transitions
   - Accent elements with stronger color presence (20% opacity instead of 5-10%)

4. For dark mode, I've increased the vibrancy by:
   - Adding more pronounced diagonal gradients
   - Increasing the opacity of the red accents
   - Using thicker borders for the geometric elements

The development server is running, so refresh your browser to see the new vibrant gradient background.

```diff
-  
+ import React from 'react';
+ import { FontAwesomeIcon } from '@fortawesome/react-fontawesome';
+ import { 
+   faCode, 
+   faCloudArrowUp, 
+   faGears, 
+   faArrowsToCircle,
+   faCircleNodes,
+   faNetworkWired
+ } from '@fortawesome/free-solid-svg-icons';
+ 
+ const ServiceCard = ({ icon, title, description, index }) => {
+   return (
+     <div className="bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 p-6 rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-2">
+       <div className="w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-agilite-red/20 to-gray-200 dark:from-agilite-red/20 dark:to-agilite-black flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
+         <FontAwesomeIcon 
+           icon={icon} 
+           className="text-xl text-agilite-red dark:text-agilite-red"
+         />
+       </div>
+       <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 dark:text-white mb-3 hover:text-agilite-red transition-colors duration-300">{title}</h3>
+       <p className="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300">{description}</p>
+     </div>
+   );
+ };
+ 
+ const Services = () => {
+   const services = [
+     {
+       icon: faCircleNodes,
+       title: 'Integration Platform',
+       description: 'Connect systems, applications, and data sources. Simplify complex interactions and automate business processes.'
+     },
+     {
+       icon: faCode,
+       title: 'API Development',
+       description: 'Create robust, scalable APIs that connect your business systems and enable seamless data exchange.'
+     },
+     {
+       icon: faCloudArrowUp,
+       title: 'Cloud Solutions',
+       description: 'Leverage cloud technologies for enhanced performance, scalability, and cost-efficiency in your business.'
+     },
+     {
+       icon: faNetworkWired,
+       title: 'Middleware Development',
+       description: 'Custom middleware solutions to bridge legacy systems with modern applications for seamless operations.'
+     },
+     {
+       icon: faGears,
+       title: 'System Integration',
+       description: 'Connect disparate systems to enable smooth data flow and unified business processes across your organization.'
+     },
+     {
+       icon: faArrowsToCircle,
+       title: 'Digital Transformation',
+       description: 'Guide your organization's transition to digital business models and technology-driven operations.'
+     }
+   ];
+ 
+   return (
+     <section id="services" className="relative py-20 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-900">
+       <div className="container mx-auto px-4">
+         <div className="text-center mb-16">
+           <h2 className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-gray-800 dark:text-white mb-4">Our Services</h2>
+           <p className="text-xl text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300 max-w-3xl mx-auto">
+             Agilit-e provides integration services that connect your business systems and streamline operations.
+           </p>
+         </div>
+         
+         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
+           {services.map((service, index) => (
+             <ServiceCard 
+               key={index}
+               icon={service.icon}
+               title={service.title}
+               description={service.description}
+               index={index}
+             />
+           ))}
+         </div>
+       </div>
+     </section>
+   );
+ };
+ 
+ export default Services;
```

I fixed the syntax error in the Services.js file. The issue was with the apostrophe in "organization's" - it was using a curly apostrophe character that JavaScript interpreted as ending the string. 

I changed the single quotes to double quotes, which allows the straight apostrophe to be used within the string. The application should now compile correctly.

```diff
+     </div>
+   );
+ };
+ 
+ export default ServiceCard;
```

```diff
+       description: 'Create robust, scalable APIs that connect your business systems and enable seamless data exchange.'

+       icon: faCloudArrowUp,

+     },
+     {
+       icon: faNetworkWired,
+       title: 'Middleware Development',
+       description: 'Custom middleware solutions to bridge legacy systems with modern applications for seamless operations.'
+     },
+     {
+       icon: faGears,
+       title: 'System Integration',

+     },
+     {
+       icon: faArrowsToCircle,
+       title: 'Digital Transformation',
+       description: "Guide your organization's transition to digital business models and technology-driven operations."
+     }
+   ];
+ 
+   return (
+     <section id="services" className="relative py-20 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-900">
+       <div className="container mx-auto px-4">
+         <div className="text-center mb-16">
+           <h2 className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-gray-800 dark:text-white mb-4">Our Services</h2>
+           <p className="text-xl text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300 max-w-3xl mx-auto">
+             Agilit-e provides integration services that connect your business systems and streamline operations.
+           </p>
+         </div>
+         
+         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
+           {services.map((service, index) => (
+             <ServiceCard 
+               key={index}
+               icon={service.icon}
+               title={service.title}
+               description={service.description}
+               index={index}
+             />
+           ))}
+         </div>
+       </div>
+     </section>
+   );
+ };
+ 
+ export default Services;
```

---

I've completely transformed the design to be more dynamic with curved elements and interesting visual patterns:

1. In the Background:
   - Added a wave-like curved pattern at the top with rounded corners
   - Created a large blurred circular accent on the right side
   - Added a complementary wave pattern at the bottom with different curve radius
   - Included an abstract shape with curved corners and rotation for visual interest

2. In the Service Cards:
   - Replaced the plain border-left with a subtle gradient wave at the bottom
   - Added a circular accent in the top-right corner that appears on hover
   - Changed the icon container to a slightly rotated square with rounded corners that straightens on hover
   - Added another circular accent in the bottom-left that appears with a delay on hover
   - Modified the container to have more rounded corners (rounded-xl instead of rounded-lg)

These design changes create a much more dynamic and visually interesting appearance with organic shapes, curved lines, and interactive elements that respond to user hovering. The color scheme maintains the vibrant red elements while adding more dimension and creativity to the overall aesthetic.

---

I've updated the logo to match the image you provided. The new logo features:

1. A central gray node surrounded by multiple red nodes in a 3D spherical formation
2. Multiple layers of red nodes at different depths to create a 3D effect:
   - Front layer: Larger nodes with full opacity
   - Middle layer: Medium-sized nodes with slightly reduced opacity
   - Back layer: Smaller nodes with further reduced opacity

3. Connection lines linking all nodes to the central gray node with varying thickness and opacity based on depth

4. Added a size option to the Logo component so it can dynamically resize based on scroll position or where it's used

The logo now accurately reflects the image you provided, with a spherical structure of red nodes arranged around a central gray node. The updated Navbar component uses this new logo and includes responsive behavior to make it smaller when scrolling.

The development server is running in the background, so you can view these changes in your browser. The logo should now match the design you wanted to use for the site.

```diff
  @layer base {
    body {

+   
+   /* Light mode custom scrollbar */

+     @apply w-2;
+   }
+   
+   ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
+     @apply bg-gray-100;
+   }
+   
+   ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
+     @apply bg-agilite-grey rounded-full;
+   }
+   
+   ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
+     @apply bg-agilite-red;
+   }
  }
```

---

I've updated the light mode with a cleaner, more modern design:

1. The background now features:
   - A subtle white gradient background instead of the red-tinted one
   - A thin red accent line at the top
   - A diagonal accent line adding visual interest
   - Subtle corner gradients that maintain brand colors but in a more understated way

2. Added customized scrollbars that use the brand colors

3. Redesigned the theme toggle to be:
   - More streamlined with a slider design
   - Color-coordinated with the brand palette
   - Clearer visual indicators for light/dark modes

The new light mode maintains the Agilit-e brand identity while providing a cleaner, more professional look with strategic use of red accents rather than an overall red tint. The development server is now running so you can check the changes.

2. Created a vibrant top header bar with a gradient from Agilit-e red to purple and blue
3. Added new accent elements:
   - A colorful circle accent in the top left area
   - A gradient diagonal line with yellow accents
   - Enhanced corner gradients with purple highlights
   - A cyan-to-gray gradient at the bottom
   - A subtle yellow-red glow accent in the bottom right

These changes add more visual interest to the light mode while keeping the interface clean and professional. The development server is now running so you can preview the changes.

---

I've significantly enhanced the light mode colors and made the theme toggle much more visible:

1. Light Mode Background Improvements:
   - Intensified the base gradient with stronger blue and pink tones (100% opacity)
   - Added a new purple/indigo accent in the middle-right area
   - Increased the size and vibrancy of all color elements
   - Enhanced the top color bar with deeper purple and blue tones
   - Made all accent lines thicker (4px instead of 3px)
   - Added more saturation to all gradient elements

2. Theme Toggle Enhancements:
   - Increased the overall size (larger width and height)
   - Added a colorful gradient background in light mode
   - Applied a subtle shadow for depth
   - Made the toggle handle larger and more prominent
   - Increased the icon size for better visibility
   - Added a text label below the toggle that shows "Light" or "Dark"
   - Improved the border styling with better contrast

These changes make the light mode much more colorful while maintaining a professional look, and the theme toggle is now much more noticeable and user-friendly.

---

I've completely redesigned the toggle switch:

1. Changed the shape to a perfect circle (12×12)
2. Removed all text labels
3. Created a visual sun/moon icon system:
   - Light mode: Shows a red sun with 8 rays radiating outward
   - Dark mode: Shows a white moon with dark craters
4. Added a subtle animation effect:
   - Icons scale in/out during toggle
   - Dark mode has a subtle pulsing red glow
5. Maintained the red border for brand consistency
6. Made the toggle larger and more visually distinctive

The new design is much more intuitive with the sun/moon icons clearly indicating which mode is active, and the animations provide visual feedback when switching between modes. The toggle is now a completely different design without any text labels.

---

I've completely redesigned the toggle as a lightbulb:

1. Created a realistic lightbulb shape with:
   - A gray metal base and thread
   - A glass bulb that changes appearance based on mode
   - Internal filament details

2. In light mode:
   - The bulb glows with a yellow color and Agilit-e red glow
   - Eight light rays emanate from the bulb in red/yellow gradient
   - The filament inside is illuminated in Agilit-e red

3. In dark mode:
   - The bulb appears dark gray/black
   - No light rays are visible
   - The filament appears dark and inactive

4. Added visual details:
   - Gradient effects for more dimension
   - A small status indicator dot
   - Smoother transitions between states
   - Proper borders to enhance the 3D appearance

The lightbulb metaphor makes the function of the toggle instantly recognizable - "on" for light mode and "off" for dark mode - while incorporating the Agilit-e red color into the design.

---

I've simplified the design to just a lightbulb icon as requested:

1. Created a clean, rounded button with a simple lightbulb inside
2. The lightbulb has:
   - A small glass bulb that glows with Agilit-e red when in light mode
   - A simple metal base/connector
   - A red filament inside that illuminates in light mode
   - Subtle light rays that appear only in light mode

3. Key improvements:
   - Simplified the design to be more icon-like
   - Removed the complex lamp structure
   - Made it proportional and centered within a circular button
   - Maintained the light/dark mode visual feedback

The toggle now looks like a standard lightbulb icon that clearly indicates the current theme state - illuminated for light mode and dark for dark mode. This simpler design should be more recognizable and intuitive.
